title: The Distance Between Us
summary: Chapter 29 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Distance Between Us. Theme: Distance becomes measured in dreams and expectations.
sceneDescription: Distance becomes emotional measurement: far lights, unsaid words, and widening space.
